list._baseAcceptanceValue: actor will always accept when their own AI decide to go to sleep, so this value is only checked if they were invited by someone else to sleep. Currently they'll lose consciousness when touching bed, but in the future i would like to extend this command into masturbation sex command or straight up sex. Instead of making them unable to act for the whole duration, make it so they'll prefer to stay in bed but nothing stops them from having sex or toilet or wander into someone else's room. or make it so their sleep consciousness mod fluctuate

list._comments: all COM with sleep tag are hard-coded to allow character without sleep need to recover 1HP and 1MP on command completion
all COM with sleep tag are hard-coded to allow character without sleep need to recover 1HP and 1MP on command completion

zh-cn.com_furniture_sleep:
玩家只有在可睡眠时间段（默认为23H-6H）才可睡眠，可以在阵营管理-工作分配界面检查玩家的时间表确认。
该指令执行后，参与者会获得时长等于参与者自身%%stats_derived_sleepNeed%%分钟的睡眠状态。当该状态结束时角色会立刻醒来
zh-cn.com_furniture_sleep_begin_2: $doer.firstname$关掉床头灯后缓缓闭上眼睛
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak: 休息一下，缓解角色压力
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingLongBreak: 缓解角色压力的同时，还会回复HP，代价是耗时翻倍
zh-cn.com_furniture_prison_ADD: 将对象监禁在此处（无法自由行动），且只能与此处的家具互动
zh-cn.com_furniture_prison_REMOVE: 将监禁于此处的对象释放
zh-cn.com_furniture_restroom_fix:
当角色有衣物被脱下后可执行。指令结束时角色会穿上所有衣物
NPC如果衣冠不整，会优先寻找合适的地点（有卫生间的地点）穿衣
zh-cn.com_furniture_getmeal_begin_1: $doer.firstname$在桌边坐下，拿起一份$name$吃了起来。

en-us.com_furniture_sleep:
Sleep. Can be executed only during sleep hours (for Player, default value is 23H-6H, can be confirmed in Player Schedules in Management-Work Assignment tab)
On execution, every participant will fall into sleep status with duration equal to %%stats_derived_sleepNeed%% in minutes, and will wake up on status removal
en-us.com_furniture_sleep_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ turned off the bedside lamp and slowly closed their eyes
en-us.com_furniture_cryosleep_begin_1_ADD: $doer.firstname$ starts putting $receiver.firstname$ into the cryosleep device
en-us.com_furniture_prison_begin_1_ADD: $doer.firstname$ starts imprisoning $receiver.firstname$ into the holding cell
en-us.com_furniture_prison_after_1_ADD: $receiver.firstname$ is being jailed in the cell
en-us.com_furniture_prison_begin_1_REMOVE: $doer.firstname$ tries releasing $receiver.firstname$ from the holding cell
en-us.com_furniture_restroom_fix:
Can be performed when target has removed clothing. Target will redress everything on command completion.
NPC will try to find a private spot first before attempting to redress.
en-us.com_furniture_getmeal_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ sat down at the table, picked up a portion of $name$ and began to eat.
en-us.com_furniture_getmeal_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ brought the $name$ closer and began eating.
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak: Take a break to relieve character stress
en-us.com_furniture_takingLongBreak: Relieves character stress and recovers HP, at the cost of double the time
en-us.com_furniture_prison_ADD: Imprison the target here (unable to move freely), can only interact with furniture in this location
